1.Title: Visionary Extremism
1.Description: The duration of the En-Nah Turret's missile bay deployed by <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Explosive Experiment</color> increases to 12s. When an Armor-Piercing Warhead or High-Explosive Warhead from any skill hits an enemy, the target's All-Attribute RES is reduced by 15% for 15s.
1.Lore:
Advance! By any means necessary!
Too many things are chasing us in this dying world: the pitch-black frontier, our fleeting lifespan.
Human life and civilization are more fragile than a Bangboo's logic core.
The only way to stay ahead of destruction is to keep moving forward, by any means necessary.
"Besides, the first to witness a new horizon always sees the most beautiful view, don't they?"

2.Title: Axiom of Universal Unity
2.Description: The Stun DMG Multiplier granted by each stack of <color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</color> in Norma's <color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability: Advantage in Numbers</color> is increased to 6%. When Norma uses <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Hat Trick</color> while in combat, she gains 25 Energy. This effect can trigger once every 20s.
2.Lore:
The world of physicists is constantly overturned by new theories. The order ordinary people rely on is just as often shattered by unexpected events and conflict.
The ties that bind all things are always mysterious, both incredibly intimate and incredibly fragile, impossible to fully comprehend.
"Bring Bangboo and Roscaelifer to greater heights? You mean 'the byproduct of chasing curiosity,' right?"

3.Title: Natural-Born Villain Paradox
3.Lore:
It's another calm, peaceful day in Roscaelifer, with clear skies and a gentle breeze.
But for the Bangboo, there may still be one ultimate supervillain...
"Why is it that the smartest genius in every kids' cartoon always ends up becoming the bad guy...?"
"Seriously, what's so great about those crazy scientists whose budget and hairline are both hanging on by a thread?"

4.Title: Bangboo Superiority Theory
4.Description: When Norma consumes <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> to trigger a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>, both Norma and the corresponding Agent gain 200 Decibels.
4.Lore:
Without a doubt, Bangboo are the most loyal companions humanity has had in the past century, the most efficient tools, and perhaps even... the most powerful weapons.
Like any child yet to be taught or any blade yet to find a worthy owner, a Bangboo can serve anyone, whether it's the righteous Phaethon or the most ruthless villain.
"First of all, I'm a pacifist who happens to love Bangboo."
"Second, part of my job is making sure the sharpest sword stays in our hands."

5.Title: En-Nah Big Bang
5.Lore:
According to archived External Strategy Department records, a project led by the young researcher Norma rapidly pushed the performance limits of mass-produced Bangboo to new heights.
Before being promoted to Chief Technician of the ESD, Norma's most important assignment was proving that she wouldn't one day launch Booastrum into orbit.
"Higher! Faster! Stronger!"
"The only things limiting imagination are courage and the R&D budget!"

6.Title: The Primary Cause of Genius
6.Description: After any squad member Stuns an enemy, Norma will continuously summon missiles to bombard random enemies on the field for 6s. A missile is launched every 0.75s, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> equal to 200% of Norma's ATK to enemies within the area. This DMG is considered <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> DMG. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once every 30s. The Daze inflicted by Armor-Piercing Warhead increases by <color=#FFFFFF>30%</color>, and the DMG dealt by High-Explosive Warhead increases by <color=#FFFFFF>30%</color>.
6.Lore: Every great creation begins with curiosity and a happy accident. Perhaps the birth of the very first Bangboo soul was nothing more than Lady Sunbringer's fascination with the mysteries of life.

DescriptionByLevel.1:
When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases her CRIT DMG by <color=#2BAD00>0.86%</color>, up to a maximum increase of <color=#2BAD00>43%</color>.
When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases the Daze dealt by her <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</color>, and <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> by <color=#2BAD00>0.44%</color> when they hit an enemy, up to a maximum increase of <color=#2BAD00>22%</color>.
Norma gains additional ATK based on her Sheer Force. Every 1 point of Sheer Force increases her ATK by 1.25, up to a maximum increase of 1,200 ATK.
Upon entering the battlefield, Norma immediately gains 60% <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></color>. In Investigation Zone Mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s.
When <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> is at least 80%, the next <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Hat Trick</color> can trigger a <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> regardless of cooldown, and consumes 80% <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> to replace the <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> with a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>.

MathSkill.Title: Additional Ability: Advantage in Numbers
MathSkill.Description:
When another character in your squad is an <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Rupture</color> character, or shares the same Faction:
When Norma, her creations, or Combat Bangboo hit an enemy, they apply 1 stack of <color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</color>. Each stack of <color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</color> increases the target's Stun DMG Multiplier by 3%, stacking up to 10 times. This effect can stack once every 0.5s.
Enemies with <color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</color> stacks have their Stun duration increased by 2s upon becoming Stunned. This Stun duration increase cannot stack with similar effects. When an enemy affected by <color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</color> recovers from Stun, the <color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</color> effect ends.
While <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000012></color> is active, Norma's ATK increases by 44. This effect scales with character level, increasing by 14 per level, up to a maximum increase of 870.
While <color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</color> is active, DMG dealt by all squad members increases by <color=#FFFFFF>20%</color>.

157100001.Title: Basic Attack: Engineering Insurance
157100001.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Performs up to four attacks forward, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.

157100002.Title: Basic Attack: Hat Trick
157100002.Description:
When Norma is the active character and is in combat, she gains 1.5% <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> per second.
When <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color> is on her head, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
After firing, Norma throws out <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color>, ordering it to unleash a round of aerial fire, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> and storing the current <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color>.
When the skill hits an enemy, it triggers the previous character's <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color>. This effect can trigger once every 5s.
Once <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color> has been thrown out, it will accumulate and retain <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> at the same speed on behalf of Norma. Norma does not need to stay on the field during this period.
After Norma retrieves the <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color>, she immediately gains the stored <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color>.
When holding <IconMap:Icon_Normal>, the <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color> will accelerate toward Norma.
If retrieving the <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color> would raise <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> to 80% or higher, the <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color> will automatically accelerate toward Norma.
When Norma switches from on field to off field while in combat, if <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color> is not full, <color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</color> automatically enters the battlefield.
Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

157100003.Title: Special Attack: Thermal Shutdown
157100003.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Bombards enemies, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.

157100004.Title: EX Special Attack: En-Nah Barrage
157100004.Description:
With enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Operates the turret to fire continuously and launch different types of missiles based on the target's state:
When the primary target is not Stunned, launches an Armor-Piercing Warhead, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> and inflicting a large amount of <color=#FFFFFF>Daze</color>.
When the primary target is Stunned, launches a High-Explosive Warhead, dealing greater <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.
After using this skill, Norma gains 16% <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></color> and enters the <color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</color> state for 32s. While <color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</color> is active, Norma deploys two <color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Turrets</color> to join the battle.
Continuing to hold extends the firing time by up to 2s, continuously consuming energy. For each 1 point of energy consumed while holding, Norma gains an additional 0.4% <color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</color>, and this round of <color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</color> lasts 0.8s longer, up to a maximum additional duration of {CAL:2*20*0.8,1,2}s.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100005.Title: Special Attack: Target Practice
157100005.Description: During battle, <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000010></color> automatically attacks enemies, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.

157100006.Title: EX Special Attack: Explosive Experiment
157100006.Description:
When any squad member Stuns an enemy, or when Norma consumes <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></color> to trigger a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000010></color> deploys its missile bay for 8s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
During this time, <color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Turrets</color> automatically attack more frequently. When performing automatic attacks, they launch different missiles based on the enemy's state:
When the primary target is not Stunned, launch an Armor-Piercing Warhead, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> and inflicting a large amount of <color=#FFFFFF>Daze</color>.
When the primary target is Stunned, launch a High-Explosive Warhead, dealing greater <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.

157110024.Description: Extended Shot DMG Multiplier Per Sec

157110025.Description: Extended Shot Daze Multiplier Per Sec

157110026.Description: Extended Shot Armor-Piercing Warhead DMG Multiplier Per Sec

157110027.Description: Extended Shot Armor-Piercing Warhead Daze Multiplier Per Sec

157110028.Description: Extended Shot High-Explosive Warhead DMG Multiplier Per Sec

157110029.Description: Extended Shot High-Explosive Warhead Daze Multiplier Per Sec

157110030.Description: Extended Shot Energy Cost Per Sec

157100007.Title: Dodge: Development Protocols
157100007.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100008.Title: Dash Attack: Deadline Rush
157100008.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Spins while firing at nearby enemies, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.

157100009.Title: Dodge Counter: Compliance Testing
157100009.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate:
Commands the Rumble Drill to continuously drill the target, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100010.Title: Chain Attack: Impact Drill
157100010.Description:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Commands a swarm of Rumble Drills to deal multiple hits, dealing massive <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100011.Title: Ultimate: Doctrine of Superior Firepower
157100011.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at <color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> to activate:
Calls in tactical artillery to bombard enemies ahead, dealing massive <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.
Upon activation, immediately gains 30% <color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100013.Title: Quick Assist: Roaring Backup
157100013.Description:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Commands the Rumble Drill to continuously attack the target, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100014.Title: Defensive Assist: Technological Bastion
157100014.Description:
When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
This skill excels at parrying enemy attacks and reduces the consumption of <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Points</color> when the character is under intense attacks.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

157100015.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Technological Suppression
157100015.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Unleashes a series of attacks, dealing <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
